page_metadata.biotools__summary: Comprehensive R based Microarray Analysis web service (CARMAweb) is a resource for the analyses of microarray data including data preprocessing, detection for differentially expressed genes, cluster analysis, and GO analysis. Calculations are performed in R using functions provided by BioConductor.
